measured_by: header facts (acquisition.py) + astrometry.net solves (solve_field.py) + Siril findstar/register metrics (frame_metrics.json); this module computes only the derived trail/drift geometry and records it

check.reason: predicted-if-fixed trail 0.9 px vs up to 2.2 px of measured elongation — within 10x: not decisive; the two-window drift solve is the instrument near the boundary

in_exposure_trail.note: predicted = 15.041 * cos(dec) * exposure / plate_scale — the smear a FIXED mount would put in every sub; no registration removes it

mount_check.reason: declared fixed matches the measured fixed signature — RA advances 14.9944 deg/hr vs sidereal 15.041

label: untracked, wide, drifting 18 px/min
route_hint: wide-field-untracked (undistort -> homography) — a wide field on a fixed mount with measurable drift
